subcodes.first_line: O Áqá Maḥmúd! In the glorious Qur'án it is addressed to the Beloved One: "And in the night season, keep vigil therewith as a supererogatory devotion for thee; it may be that..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آقا محمود در قرآن عظیم خطاب بحضرت حبیب و من اللیل فتحجد به نافله لک عسی ان
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
